Describe the sequence of visual events shown in the video, noting specific actions and transitions from the beginning to the end.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the Felt Bicycles logo fades in from a black background; at 4s, the scene transitions to a forest with white-barked aspen trees; at 6s, a person wearing dark clothing rides a bicycle through the woods; at 10s, a bicycle wheel rolls on a dirt path; at 16s, a cyclist wearing a silver helmet rides towards the camera.

canonical_answer: Shimano Deore XT branding is visible on the black crankset.
